subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested His Cause, fulfilled His Promise, and spoken that which draweth mankind nigh unto Him. Verily, He is the Possessor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر امره و انجز وعده و نطق بما یقرب الناس الیه انه لهو المالک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
